apierror-centralauth-badsession: Waxaa kaliya lagu heli karaa centralauthtoken marka la isticmaalayo kalfadhi CentralAuth ah.
apierror-centralauth-badtoken: centralauthtoken ma aha mid sax ah.
apierror-centralauth-badusername: Magaca isticmaalaha "$1" laguma isticmaali karo wiki-kan
apierror-centralauth-editconflict: Isku dhaca wax ka beddelka ayaa la ogaaday, hawshana waa la joojiyay.
apierror-centralauth-notattached: Lama heli karo centralauthtoken adigoon lahayn akoon caalami ah oo ku xiran.
apierror-centralauth-notloggedin: Isticmaalayaasha aan la aqoon  ma heli karaan centralauthtoken.
apierror-centralauth-renameinprogress: Isticmaalaha waa la beddelayaa magaciisa, sidaas darteed lama isticmaali karo.
apihelp-centralauthtoken-extended-descri: Waxay soo celisaa token loo isticmaali karo in lagu xaqiijiyo codsiyada API ee wikis kale. Codsiyada API ee ficil, geli xuduudaha GET ee centralauthtoken. Codsiyada REST API, ku dar cinwaanka Authorization: CentralAuthToken {token}. Logic-ga frontend-ka MediaWiki, waxaad isticmaali kartaa module-ka ResourceLoader ee mediawiki.ForeignApi.
apihelp-centralauthtoken-summary: Hel centralauthtoken si aad u sameyso codsi xaqiijin ah oo loogu dirayo wiki ku xiran akoonka.
apihelp-createlocalaccount-example-1: Si qasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah oo loogu talagalay [[User:Example]].
apihelp-createlocalaccount-param-reason: Sababta loo abuurayo akoonka maxalliga ah.
apihelp-createlocalaccount-param-usernam: Isticmaalaha loo abuurayo akoonka maxalliga ah.
apihelp-createlocalaccount-summary: Si qasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah. Waa in uu jiraa akoonka caalamiga ah.
apihelp-globaluserrights-example-1: Ku dar isticmaale FooBot kooxda caalamiga ah ee "bot", kana saar kooxaha caalamiga ah ee "maamule" iyo "xafiiska"
apihelp-globaluserrights-example-2: Ku dar isticmaale caalami ah oo leh Aqoonsi 123 kooxda caalamiga ah ee "bot", kana saar kooxaha caalamiga ah ee "maamule" iyo "xafiiska"
apihelp-globaluserrights-param-add: Ku dar isticmaalaha kooxahan caalamiga ah.
apihelp-globaluserrights-param-expiry: Waqtiyada dhammaadka. Waxay noqon karaan kuwo qaraabo ah (tusaale <kbd>5 months</kbd> ama <kbd>2 weeks</kbd>) ama kuwo sax ah (tusaale <kbd>2014-09-18T12:34:56Z</kbd>). Haddii hal shaambadda waqtiga la dejiyo, waxaa loo adeegsan doonaa dhammaan kooxaha lagu daray xuduudaha <var>$1add</var>. Isticmaal <kbd>infinite</kbd>, <kbd>indefinite</kbd>, <kbd>infinity</kbd>, ama <kbd>never</kbd> si kooxda isticmaalaha aysan waligeed u dhammaanin.
apihelp-globaluserrights-param-remove: Ka saar isticmaalaha kooxahan caalamiga ah.
apihelp-globaluserrights-summary: Ku dar ama ka saar isticmaale kooxaha caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-example-2: Muuji macluumaad qaar ku saabsan isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah oo ka bilaabanaya "ABC"
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-exclu: Ka reeb isticmaalayaasha ku jira kooxaha caalamiga ah ee la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-from: Magaca isticmaalaha ee lagu bilaabayo liis gareynta .
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-group: Ku xadid isticmaalayaasha kooxaha caalamiga ah ee la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-limit: Imisa magac isticmaale oo guud ayaa la soo celinayaa.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-exclu: Ka reeb isticmaalayaasha leh magacyo akoon oo la magacaabay.
Ka reeb isticmaalayaasha leh akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-prefi: Raadi dhammaan isticmaalayaasha ku bilaabma qiimahan.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-prop: Qaybaha macluumaadka la doonayo in lagu daro:
apihelp-query+globalallusers-paramvalue-: Haddii akoonka isticmaalaha la qufulay iyo in kale.
Liiska kooxaha caalamiga ah ee uu isticmaalehu ka tirsan yahay. Tani waxay isticmaashaa kheyraad server oo dheeraad ah waxaana laga yaabaa inay soo celiso natiijooyin ka yar xadka la dejiyay.
Ku dar macluumaad muujinaya haddii isticmaalaha uu si maxalli ah u jiro iyo in kale.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-param-to: Magaca isticmaalaha ee lagu joojinayo liis gareynta.
apihelp-query+globalallusers-summary: Liis garee dhammaan isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+globalgroups-example-2: Muuji kooxaha caalamiga ah iyo xuquuqaha ay bixiyaan
apihelp-query+globalgroups-param-prop: Macluumaad noocee ah ayaa la doonayaa in lagu daro.
apihelp-query+globalgroups-summary: Liis garee dhammaan kooxaha caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+globalrenamestatus-example: Hel macluumaad ku saabsan isticmaalaha caalamiga ah ee hadda jira
apihelp-query+globalrenamestatus-param-u: Isticmaalaha la beddelayo magaciisa. Waxay noqon kartaa magaciisii hore ama magaciisa cusub.
apihelp-query+globalrenamestatus-summary: Muuji macluumaad ku saabsan beddelka magacyada caalamiga ah ee hadda socda.
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-example-1: Hel macluumaad ku saabsan isticmaalaha caalamiga ah ee hadda jira
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-example-2: Hel macluumaad ku saabsan isticmaalaha caalamiga ah [[User:Example|Example]]
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-param-id: Aqoonsiga isticmaalaha caalamiga ah ee laga helayo macluumaadka. Haddii <var>$1user</var> iyo <var>$1id</var> labadaba laga tago, waxaa si toos ah loo isticmaali doonaa isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-param-prop: Guryaha la rabo in la helo:
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-paramvalue-: Hel liiska kooxaha caalamiga ah ee isticmaalahani ku jiro.
Hel liiska xuquuqaha caalamiga ah ee isticmaalahani leeyahay.
Hel liiska akoonnada la isku daray.
Hel liiska akoonnada aan ku xirnayn.
Hel tirada guud ee wax ka beddelka isticmaalaha caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-param-user: Isticmaalaha laga doonayo in laga helo macluumaadka. Haddii <var>$1user</var> iyo <var>$1id</var> labadaba laga tago, waxaa si toos ah loogu isticmaali doonaa isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+globaluserinfo-summary: Maaji macluumaad ku saabsan isticmaale caalami ah.
apihelp-query+wikisets-example-2: Muuji wiki la dejiyay iyo noocyadooda
apihelp-query+wikisets-param-from: Magaca wiki la dejiyay laga bilaabayo.
apihelp-query+wikisets-param-limit: Imisa wiki loo dejiyay ayaa la soo celinayaa.
apihelp-query+wikisets-param-prop: Macluumaad noocee ah ayaa la doonayaa in lagu daro:
apihelp-query+wikisets-paramvalue-prop-t: Ku saleysan oggolaansho oo kaliya ku daraya wikis la cayimay, ama ku saleysan ka noqosho oo ku daraya dhammaan wikiyada marka laga reebo kuwa la cayimay.
apihelp-query+wikisets-paramvalue-prop-w: Wikiyada ku jira u dejin wiki.
Wikiyada aan ku jirin u dejin wiki.
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-example-1: Quful akoonka caalamiga ah ee [[User:Example]] sababta "Spam"
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-example-2: Fur oo qari akoonka caalamiga ah ee [[User:Example]] sababta "Waan awoodaa"
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-param-hid: Beddel haddii isticmaalahan aan la qarin, laga qariyo liiska isticmaalayaasha caalamiga ah, ama la caburiyo.
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-param-loc: Beddel haddii isticmaalahan la xiro ama aan la xirin.
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-param-sta: MD5 ikhtiyaari ah oo ah xaaladda hadda la filayo userid:username:hidden:locked. Tan waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ogaado isku dhaca wax ka beddelka. Qiimaha hidden waa inuu noqdaa xarig madhan haddii aan la qarin, ama lists ama suppressed. Qiimaha locked waa inuu noqdaa 1 haddii la xiro, 0 haddii aan la xirin. Tusaalooyin: 2128506:LeeSmith::0; 3839611:VandalGoblin:suppressed:1.
apihelp-setglobalaccountstatus-summary: Qari ama quful (ama fur ama ka saar qarinta) akoonka isticmaalaha caalamiga ah.
